Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Brian McMahon
Message:
Genesis: krepis — general-purpose primitives for data + LLM pipelines

krepis (Greek κρηπίς — the foundation course a structure stands on) is a
small, typed library of building blocks for services running on AWS:
structured logging, SSM-backed secrets, Telegram/SNS alert routing,
bounded-backoff HTTP retry, S3 conditional-PUT writer locks, the Anthropic
payload chokepoint, LLM cost telemetry, and trading-calendar/date helpers.

16 modules + 490 tests, green on Python 3.9–3.14. MIT LICENSE + NOTICE +
DCO CONTRIBUTING; CI (pytest matrix + failure-notify) and OIDC PyPI publish
workflows.

Refs nousergon/alpha-engine-config#1130.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Brian McMahon <brian@nousergon.ai>
